<?php
require '/wordpress/wp-load.php';

$content = '<!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"meridian/hero-bio"} /-->
<!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"meridian/expertise-grid"} /-->
<!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"meridian/experience-timeline"} /-->
<!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"meridian/volunteering"} /-->
<!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"meridian/talks-grid"} /-->
<!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"meridian/publications-list"} /-->
<!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"meridian/newsletter-cta"} /-->';

$post_id = wp_insert_post( [
	'post_title'   => 'Home',
	'post_name'    => 'home',
	'post_status'  => 'publish',
	'post_type'    => 'page',
	'post_content' => $content,
] );

if ( $post_id && ! is_wp_error( $post_id ) ) {
	update_option( 'show_on_front', 'page' );
	update_option( 'page_on_front', $post_id );
}
?>
